fallback.bookingPackageQ: How do I book a tour package?
fallback.bookingPackageA: To book a package, search for your destination, select your preferred itinerary, and click Book Now. You will enter traveler details and complete payment securely through our marketplace.
fallback.bookingConfirmationQ: Where can I find my booking confirmation?
fallback.bookingConfirmationA: Your confirmation is available in your TourX account after checkout. You should also receive confirmation details from the travel agent or TourX notification flow.
fallback.bookingModifyQ: Can I modify my traveler information after booking?
fallback.bookingModifyA: Contact the travel agent as soon as possible with the corrected traveler details. Changes depend on package availability, partner rules, and document deadlines.
fallback.bookingAuthenticityQ: How do I verify the authenticity of a Travel Agency?
fallback.bookingAuthenticityA: Open the agency profile to review its verification status, package history, traveler feedback, and contact details before confirming a trip.
fallback.paymentMethodsA: Supported payment options depend on the travel agent and package. Check the package details before booking.
fallback.refundStatusQ: How can I check my refund status?
fallback.refundStatusA: Review your booking messages or contact the travel agent handling the reservation for the latest refund update.
fallback.invoiceQ: Can I receive an invoice for my booking?
fallback.invoiceA: Yes. Ask the travel agent or support contact for invoice details after your booking is confirmed.
fallback.includedQ: What is included in a tour package?
fallback.includedA: Each package shows its own inclusions, such as flights, hotels, local guides, duration, traveler limits, and destination details.
fallback.availabilityQ: How do I know if a package is available?
fallback.availabilityA: Active packages are available to browse. Confirm final dates and capacity with the travel agent before payment.
fallback.customQ: Can I request a custom itinerary?
fallback.customA: Some travel agents can customize routes, dates, or activities. Contact the agent from the package or profile page.
fallback.agencyContactQ: How do I contact a travel agency?
fallback.agencyContactA: Open the agent profile or package detail page to view available contact and profile information.
fallback.agencyFollowQ: Can I follow a travel agency?
fallback.agencyFollowA: Yes. Logged-in users can follow travel agents from their profile page and return to them later.
fallback.accountUpdateQ: How do I update my profile?
fallback.accountUpdateA: Go to My Page, open My Profile, and update your personal details, image, and contact information.
fallback.savedTripsA: Saved Trips are available from My Page. Tap the heart icon on packages to save or remove them.
fallback.cancellationA: Cancellation rules vary by travel agent and package. Review the package details and confirm with the agent before booking.
fallback.documentsQ: Which travel documents do I need?
fallback.documentsA: Document needs depend on destination and traveler nationality. Always check passport, visa, insurance, and voucher requirements early.
fallback.writeArticleQ: Can I share travel stories on TourX?
fallback.writeArticleA: Yes. Use Write Article from My Page to share travel stories, tips and guides, news, or humor posts.
fallback.communityRulesQ: What content is allowed in community posts?
fallback.communityRulesA: Keep posts travel-relevant, respectful, accurate, and safe for the TourX community.
fallback.supportQ: How do I get more help?
fallback.supportA: Use the help page topics first, then contact the relevant travel agent or TourX support channel for booking-specific questions.
fallback.tourxA: TourX is a travel marketplace for discovering tour packages, travel agents, saved trips, and traveler community content.
